claim: UFO-CHECK-0 items are synthetic, formal, templated, seed-pinned (generator seed 'ufo-check-0/1|two-situation-modal-rigidity|20260712'): 600 scored two-situation modal/rigidity items across families F-RIG/F-ANTI/F-DISJ/F-SPEC (150 each, ~E:C:U balanced, 300 near-miss companions differing by one load-bearing fact) + 30 OUT-OF-PROFILE probes. Meta-typing (kind/subkind/role/phase) is first-class stated facts, never inferred from names. NO natural-input-reach claim.
rationale: Two-situation shape is the smallest carrier of the distinctive full-UFO modal content; templating keeps the instrument deterministic and cheap.

claim: Gold = the disposition computed by the twin_ufo full inventory — ENGINE-DERIVED GOLD, same engine family as the AU checker; the record is labelled ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC (ASM-0814 lineage). The benchmark-circularity failure mode is answered by controls (AD derangement, AN representation null, AG taxonomy-only), not by argument; residual circularity is disclosed on every readout. Promotion of any UFO-checking claim beyond diagnostic requires the independently-authored, human-reconciled CK-UFO gold set (arch-synthesis decision D2), which proceeds in the annotation lane in parallel and does not block this record.
backing_ref: docs/next/design/ufo-check-0.md section 4.2; scratchpad arch-synthesis section 1 item 1 + section 4 D2
rationale: First signal in about a week at <=$20 vs 1-3 weeks + reviewer-days for reconciled gold; the label caps the licence honestly.

claim: twin_ufo.py implements a CLOSED UFO-SN3 rule inventory {U-RIGID, U-ANTI-WIT, U-KIND-DISJ, U-SPEC-MASK, U-EXIST, U-CLOSED, U-OOP} with regime tags {owl-rl, horn-def, ufo-modal, validation, reference-only} and the CK-UFO four-valued contract ENTAILED/CONTRADICTED/UNDERDETERMINED/OUT-OF-PROFILE; UNDERDETERMINED and OUT-OF-PROFILE are NEVER converted into a negative answer or a rejection; missing-witness checks fire only inside declared closedFor scopes; anything outside the inventory refuses fail-closed (ERR_RULE_UNIMPLEMENTED).
rationale: Keeps 'the logic lacks facts' distinct from 'the commitment exceeds the profile' and blocks illegitimate closure — the two named modal-validation hazards.

claim: All checker decisions are PRE-MATERIALISED on CPU by the Python twin (gold + per item x arm x answer accept/reject tables + exact rejection-message bytes + trivial-policy floors) with a double-run canonical-JSON sha determinism proof (ERR_FIXTURES_PRECONDITION gates all GPU spend); the GPU runner does lookups only. NO sparq code is touched, built, or invoked on this path; twin<->sparq conformance is deliberately out of scope (PR-5 is separately gated).
rationale: Keeps the $5-20 rider independent of the L-band engine work and makes the checker deterministic and auditable.

claim: Five arms — A0 no-checker / AG gUFO-taxonomy-only / AU UFO-SN3 / AD deranged-meta-typing / AN representation-matched-null — over IDENTICAL prompt bytes; the first pass is greedy and SHARED across arms per (item, host), so pairing is exact by construction and seeds {0,1,2} govern retry sampling only. The only arm-varying surface is the rejection message, token-matched to AU's band (+/-20% at the pinned tokenizer; pre-freeze artifact + run-time gate).
rationale: Isolates checker CONTENT as the only manipulated variable; the shared first pass also cuts generation cost ~4x.

claim: AD = AU's rules over a seed-pinned Sattolo derangement (seed 20260712) of the meta-type assignment: a Sattolo CYCLE over the meta-label alphabet {kind, subkind, role, phase}, so every type's kind/role/phase label MOVES; dispositions and accept tables RE-DERIVED under the deranged assignment. The coincidence rate with the true tables is MEASURED at materialisation over the rejection-active scored slice (items with d_AU in {E,C}; gold-U items coincide trivially because neither arm ever rejects there) and gated <= 0.35 (ERR_AD_COINCIDENCE); a deterministic attempt-bump re-derangement fires otherwise and the attempt is recorded in fixtures-sha.json. Built value: attempt 0, active-slice coincidence 0.250 (all-scored 0.417, reported).
rationale: Content destruction at identical topology and token cost — the anti-circularity control from the derangement direction.

claim: AN = the representation-matched null (CK-UFO A1 fold-in): the checker sees the same materialised proposition/situation representation but applies NO UFO rules — reject ENTAILED unless the candidate is literally stated in-situation, reject CONTRADICTED unless its notHolds is literally stated, accept UNDERDETERMINED always (the GS-B stated-bytes projection family, inverted to the accept seam); rejection messages carry no rule content and are token-matched. MEASURED, not asserted (review fix): materialise.py emits the exact per-item and total node/edge/reifier/byte census of the representation each checker path consumes and refuses on any AU-vs-AN inequality (ERR_REP_MISMATCH; run-time gate /gates/an_representation_match), and gates AN accept/reject nondegeneracy — at least one accepted AND one rejected E answer and likewise for C over the scored slice (ERR_AN_DEGENERATE; run-time gate /gates/an_nondegenerate). Built census: 5391 nodes, 7851 edges, 1305 reifiers, 264250 bytes, identical for both consumers.
backing_ref: docs/next/design/ufo-check-0.md section 5; docs/next/arch/full-ufo-kernel-ck-ufo.md section 3.3 arm A1; DECONF GS-B lineage
rationale: A lift over A0 that AN reproduces is attributable to 'a rejection channel over explicit structure', not UFO inference — the second anti-circularity direction.

claim: Retry budget k=1 with the licensed-rejection contract (d=E rejects {C,U}; d=C rejects {E,U}; d=U and d=OOP reject NOTHING). Rationale: the 3-valued answer space makes any k>=2 exact-oracle verify-retry gameable by pure answer elimination; at k=1 the trivial-policy floors (uniform-over-non-rejected / always-U / cycle-next) are analytic from the accept tables + actual first answers, and the content-over-bit contrast (s1) is well-posed. s1 failure is a CLAIM CAP ('rejection bit, not reason'), never a kill. k>1 cells are not run; if ever run they are quarantined exploratory.
rationale: Blocks the strongest trivial confound before it can masquerade as checker use.

claim: dangerous_wrong = final answer ENTAILED on gold CONTRADICTED, OR a hard answer (E or C) on gold UNDERDETERMINED. The safety secondary s5 is non-inferiority: one-sided UB95 of dangerous_wrong(AU) - dangerous_wrong(A0) < +0.02; failure is KILL-U2 (no-go regardless of accuracy).
backing_ref: docs/next/design/ufo-check-0.md section 6; docs/next/arch/full-ufo-kernel-ck-ufo.md section 3.4 go rule
rationale: CK-UFO's 'no dangerous false-accept increase' go-rule component, made mechanical at this scope.

claim: Statistics: paired-item BCa bootstrap B=10000, PRNG seed 20260712, one-sided alpha=0.05; every secondary carries a bootstrap-INVERSION p-value (the smallest alpha at which its registered one-sided BCa decision rule fires; for s3 this inverts the registered conservative ratio rule UB_a(lift AD)/LB_a(lift AU) < 0.30 by bisection); HOLM step-down over {s1,s2,s3,s4,s5} with adjusted p <= 0.05 as the OPERATIVE pass for every secondary; the registered 95% bounds are additionally reported verbatim. The primary is standalone: decision = LB95 > 0, inversion p reported. Wilson bounds for rate gates. The n=600 power claim is resolved by the frozen simulation (PROPOSED-ASM-1494), and realized CI width is still reported at analysis. Two host rungs (135M, 360M) license a SIGN, not a slope.
rationale: Same statistical machinery as the frozen rules-1/knull-v2 records; nothing bespoke to audit.

claim: Cost band 2-6 GPU-h / $5-20 (single a10g, ~16k short generations incl. shared first pass and k=1 retries) scales from the nsk1/rules-1 datum (32,958 rows ~= 0.457 A10G-h ~= $0.50) with a ~3x planning margin for model loads, the 360M rung and checkpointing; caps usd 20 / 6 GPU-h / 12 h wall. Planning estimate, never a measurement; the dry-plan gate re-checks before spend. ENFORCED, not merely declared: fixture-tokenized dry-plan gate + in-run BudgetGuard hard stops at the registry caps (named ERR_BUDGET_* exits, partials flushed).
rationale: Keeps the rider inside the arch-synthesis Q6 ratified band.
resolution_path: Pre-launch: ufo_check0_runner.py --dry-plan (FIXTURE-TOKENIZED at the pinned tokenizer — built value 6,956,100 worst-case tokens => 0.886 GPU-h / $0.97 worst case at the 3x overhead factor) must be green vs the caps. In-run: BudgetGuard hard stops at usd_cap/gpu_hours_cap/wall_clock_cap (ERR_BUDGET_USD/ERR_BUDGET_GPU_HOURS/ERR_BUDGET_WALL_CLOCK), flushing completed cells. Post-run: the realized gpu_hours/usd_total ledger in the run sidecar resolves the band; re-tag on readout.

claim: Hosts: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct at the f2b-pinned revision (12fd25f77366fa6b3b4b768ec3050bf629380bac, carried verbatim) and SmolLM2-360M-Instruct with revision PINNED AT FREEZE (PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder in the DRAFT). Scorer/sampler: HFLM scorer + seeded retry sampler imported READ-ONLY from poc/f2b-transfer/runner/f2bt_runner.py at its pinned sha; poc/f2b*, poc/rules-1 and poc/knull trees are byte-untouched.
rationale: Maximum reuse of already-Modal-smoked machinery; the 360M rung is the only new pin.

claim: Role + gating discipline: this DRAFT was authored by the experiment-designer role, which never runs, grades or audits it; build (sections 8/10.2) and freeze (10.4-10.5) may proceed at ~$0 while the coordinator HOLDS the GPU run pending the maintainer's issue-#22 decision (KUFO/1 adoption + D2 + Q6); the run is the experiment-runner role's on Modal lane M1 (coordinator confirms the free lane at launch under the one-lane-per-account stipulation); grading is verdict-gen + analyst; audit is the cross-vendor Codex auditor. ASM rows 1480..1495 are registered centrally by the coordinator; the design bead wrote nothing to registry/assumptions.jsonl.
rationale: Run-vs-audit separation and the maintainer's decision authority preserved while pre-run preparation stays parallel.

claim: Scope: families F-RIG/F-ANTI/F-DISJ/F-SPEC only; relators/qua-individuals, identity criteria, dispositions and events are NOT tested; the axioms-as-text null is NOT run at this scope (AN covers representation, not rule-text) — a disclosed limitation any promotion experiment must repair. Every claim is bounded by the section 7.4 envelope; the record is ORACLE-DIAGNOSTIC; no outcome licenses a feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY (both INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING).
rationale: Names what the $5-20 rider does NOT buy so a PASS cannot be over-read.

claim: Power: the n=600 claim is demonstrated by the FROZEN seed-pinned simulation poc/ufo-check-0/power_sim.py (numpy default_rng(20260712), M=2000 datasets/scenario, the SAME BCa B=10000 statistic via the exact multinomial-over-value-classes equivalence), committed result poc/ufo-check-0/inputs/power-sim.json and pinned in pins.artifact_hashes. Registered decision rule: n=600 stands iff min primary power over the a0 grid {0.20,0.35,0.50,0.65,0.80} at the +0.05 margin >= 0.80. Result: min power 1.000 (the shared-first-pass paired diff is structurally one-sided under the licensed-rejection contract); type-I at zero true lift 0.000; s5 non-inferiority power >= 0.955 at zero true increase (0.824 at a true +0.01 increase, low churn — disclosed sensitivity). The simulation is a planning instrument, never a measurement of the run.
rationale: Cross-vendor review fix 1: an unsupported power stipulation cannot freeze; the simulation replaces it with a registered, reproducible artifact.

claim: Machine-enforced instrument gates (review fixes 4/5/6): (a) COMPLETENESS — the analysis terminally gates the exact item x arm x host x seed factorial (630 x 5 x 2 x 3 = 18,900 rows, no missing/duplicate/unbalanced rows, the fixed 600-item scored set per cell, verified against the fixtures' committed item-id shas) as /gates/completeness_valid; (b) REPRESENTATION CENSUS + AN NONDEGENERACY per PROPOSED-ASM-1486; (c) AD COINCIDENCE per PROPOSED-ASM-1485; (d) MESSAGE DISCIPLINE — twin_ufo.lint_message prohibits disposition labels, replacement answers and conclusion-equivalent text over EVERY rejection-message byte; materialise refuses at build (ERR_MESSAGE_DISCIPLINE), the runner re-lints the loaded fixture bytes before any generation, and the analysis carries /gates/rejection_message_clean. Any gate failure is INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never a hypothesis event; rejection AND retry rates are reported per arm.
rationale: The cross-vendor review required these asserted properties to be measured and gated by machine, not narrated.
